positive: A mystical forest clearing at twilight, featuring a gentle, stylized silhouette of a majestic stag standing among glowing flora and intricate fern patterns. The composition is centered, utilizing negative space effectively. Color palette is deep indigo, sapphire blue, emerald green, and hints of luminous gold for the glow effects. The artistic style should be highly detailed graphic illustration with clean vector lines, mimicking a sophisticated, modern tattoo flash or woodcut print. Strong contrast between the deep shadows and the glowing elements. Designed for seamless repeat or single high-quality placement on apparel. Aspect ratio 1:1.
negative: blur, low resolution, grainy, artifact, text, watermark, signature, logo, bad anatomy, extra limbs, deformed, noise, smudges, clutter, harsh lines, gradients
